leadText: The Pixie Plate (Japanese: せいれいプレート Spirit Plate) is a type of held item introduced in Generation VI. It is a Key Item in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It is one of the Plates, which are associated with Arceus.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Fairy-type moves by 20%. If the holder uses Judgment , it becomes a Fairy-type move. Multitype changes an Arceus holding this item to its Fairy-type form . Item manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give Arceus a Plate or remove a Plate from Arceus. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Multitype changes an Arceus holding this item to its Fairy-type form . In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , the Pixie Plate can used from the satchel on Arceus , changing it to the Fairy type . The Pixie Plate can be read, and has the following engraving: "The Original One is in all things. The Original One is nowhere at all."

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Fairy-type moves by 20%. If the holder uses Judgment , it becomes a Fairy-type move. Multitype changes an Arceus holding this item to its Fairy-type form . Item manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give Arceus a Plate or remove a Plate from Arceus.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Fairy-type moves. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a stone tablet that boosts the power of Fairy-type moves. LA A stone tablet imbued with the essence of fairies. When used on a certain Pokémon, it allows that Pokémon to gain the power of the Fairy type. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of fairies and boosts the power of the holder’s Fairy-type moves.
